macaroni-and-cheese-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Macaroni And Cheese In The Oven
instructions: Boil the pasta for 7 minutes in plenty of salted water and strain.
Add half the butter and mix the pasta to butter.
Crush the feta cheese and anthotyr in a bowl, add the graviera and mix.
Brush with the remaining butter the base and the side walls of a large shallow baking pan and spread half the pasta inside.
Sprinkle them with half the cheeses and cover with the rest of the pasta we make simple. Sprinkle with the other cheeses and gently press the surface down.
Beat eggs with yogurt in a bowl and become cream.
Add the milk and beat to dilute the mixture.
Add salt – measure because cheeses are allready salty and delicious – freshly ground pepper, sweet paprika and nutmeg.
We evenly pour the pasta with the egg mixture, shaking them a little with the fork to go everywhere.
Bake the food in a preheated oven at 170°C, in the air, in the medium grill for about 40 minutes, until the surface is well browned and crusted.
Allow it to stand for 10 minutes and then cut it into large square pieces and serve while it is still warm.

macaroni-cookies-and-liqueur-cake-lezzet.name: Macaroni Cookies And Liqueur Cake

ingredients.item: 110 gr butter ( softened in the heat of the room)

instructions: 1. Imari usulu melt and mix thoroughly.
2. Leave to cool.
3. thoroughly &ccedil with butter and powder sugar mixer in a container;
4. Add the egg yolks into one and continue to rub.
5. Add and mix the pot.
6. flour and mix thoroughly.
7. thoroughly &ccedil with mixer with a tablespoon of powder sugar.
8. Add the mixture to the dough and eat well with spoon.
9. Transfer pulp to lubricated round cake mold.
10. Bake 30-35 minutes in oven set to 180 degrees.
11. 11. Leave it from the oven and cool.
12. Slice and powdered sugar sprinkle.
12. August Serve s&uuml with blueberries and mint leaves.

make-some-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-o.name: Make Some Grilled Chicken Breasts With Orange And Ginger Sauce
make-some-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-o.original_name: Haz unas pechugas de pollo a la plancha con salsa de naranja y jengibre

ingredients.item: 2  pechugas de pollo medianas (aproximadamente 300 g en total)
1 cda de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)
1 pint of freshly ground black pepper
200 ml of natural orange juice (freshly squeezed with 3 big oranges)
1 cdita de ralladura de naranja (solo la parte naranja)
1  trozo de jengibre fresco de 2 cm, pelado y rallado
1 cdita de salsa de soja baja en sodio
1 cdite of maicena dissolved in 1 tablespoon cold water

instructions: Clean chicken breasts by withdrawing any excess fat. You can cut them horizontally to get them cooked faster or leave them whole if you prefer more juicy.
Marina las pechugas con sal, pimienta, aceite de oliva y tomillo. Deja reposar al menos 15 minutos a temperatura ambiente.
In an anti-stick frying pan or grill with medium-high heat, cook the breast 4-5 minutes per side or until they are golden and baked from inside (75-3) at the centre if using thermometer).
In the meantime, prepare the sauce. In a small frying pan, mix the orange juice, fringes, ginger, honey and soya sauce. Cooking at medium heat till it starts to boil.
It reduces fire and adds dissolved maicene. It constantly removes till the salsa weighs (about 3-5 minutes).
Kill the fire and add the sesame oil if you're using it. Retich the taste: you can add more honey if you prefer a more sweet or ginger touch if you seek more intensity.
Sirve las pechugas calientes con la salsa por encima o a un lado para mojar.

mango-semifreddo-teleculinaria.name: Mango Semifreddo

ingredients.item: 2 dl  polpa de manga de lata

instructions: Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water and reserve. Meanwhile put the mango pulp in a pot, add the sugar and bring it to the heat until boiling. Then remove and gather the gelatin leaves well drained, stir and let it cool.

In a bowl beat the creams in whipped cream very firm and in another bowl the clears in castle also very firm. Add the creams to the sleeve preparation and finally add the clear ones. Combine small forms with oil and divide by these the cream. Then take it to the cold until solidified, when serving, unshape and water with a soak in the can. Decorate to taste.

mansion-salad-argiro.name: Mansion Salad

ingredients.item: 300 grola red and green, lettuce, radiccio
1 green apple with its peel (cut into thin slices)
1 red apple with its peel (cut into thin slices)
300 grola red and green, lettuce, radiccio
1 green apple with its peel (cut into thin slices)
1 red apple with its peel (cut into thin slices)

instructions: In an anti-stick pan, add the nuts, sugar and spices.
In medium to high heat, allow the sugar to melt for a few minutes.
Once it starts melting, mix well with an oily spoon so that the nuts are dressed with caramel.
Pour the caramelized nuts into a non-stick paper or silicone surface and allow them to cool.
In a non-stick pan without a fatty substance, add the finely chopped bacon to a high heat for 2–3 minutes.
We put it on absorbent paper to dry and make it crispy.
On an open platter, spread the coarsely chopped salad leaves first.
Lay the apples in thin slices.
Sprinkle with cranberry, caramelized walnuts and manuri rubs.
Mix all the ingredients of the dressing.
Pour the salad and serve immediately.

maple-roast-vegetables.name: Maple Roast Vegetables

ingredients.prep: peeled, sliced in half lengthwise, then cut into 2-inch pieces
unpeeled, split lengthwise, seeds removed and cut into half moons (you could also use peeled butternut squash)

instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
Place all the ingredients in a bowl and toss to coat the vegetables (at this point you can place the vegetables in a large zipper bag and refrigerate overnight).
Pour the vegetables on to a foil lined sheet tray and roast for 50 minutes, stirring halfway through, or until tender and golden.
Serve.

margarides-sponge-cake-teleculinaria.name: Margaride's Sponge Cake
instructions: Fill a shape with vegetable paper and then grease it with butter. Start the oven at 170 degrees.
In a bowl, beat the yolks very well with the eggs, until they are very bulky and compact, gradually adding the sugar and lemon shaving to taste. Keep beating until you stop feeling the sugar.

Adicione depois a farinha peneirada e envolva suavemente. Deite a massa na forma e leve ao forno durante cerca de 35 minutos. Retire do forno e deixe arrefecer. Desenforme, mantendo o papel vegetal, e sirva.

marinated-zucchini-with-hazelnuts-and-ri.name: Marinated Zucchini With Hazelnuts And Ricotta

ingredients.item: Summer squash or zucchini (or pattypan squash!)

instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Toss squash and 1½ tsp. kosher salt in a colander; set over a bowl. Let sit 10 minutes, then pat dry with paper towels.
Toss hazelnuts and 1 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet and roast, shaking occasionally, until golden brown, 15–20 minutes. Let cool; crush into large pieces with a measuring cup or glass.
Smack 3 mint sprigs against your cutting board a few times to release their flavor; mix in a large bowl with garlic, vinegar, sugar, red pepper flakes, and 2 Tbsp. oil; set dressing aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high until shimmering. Arrange squash cut side down in skillet, breaking into smaller pieces if needed in order to fit in a single layer, and cook, moving around in pan to ensure even browning, until golden brown on cut side, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover (if you don’t have a lid use a baking sheet), and continue to cook until very tender, about 15 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let cool slightly.

Cut squash into 2" pieces and toss in reserved dressing to coat; season with kosher salt and black pepper. Let sit at room temperature, tossing occasionally, 15 minutes. Pluck out mint sprigs; discard.
Meanwhile, zest lemon half into a small bowl, mix in ricotta and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil; season with kosher salt. Hang on to that lemon.

Spread lemon ricotta over platter. Top with squash and their juices. Squeeze reserved lemon over. Pull leaves from remaining mint sprigs (you want about ¼ cup). Scatter mint and hazelnuts over squash. Drizzle generously with oil and sprinkle with sea salt. Serve with toast.

marraquetas-with-avocado-an-to-make-chil.name: Marraquetas With Avocado: An -to-make Chilean Breakfast
marraquetas-with-avocado-an-to-make-chil.original_name: Marraquetas con palta: un desayuno chileno fácil de hacer

ingredients.item: 3 fresh tights (can be replaced with crispy bark breads as small baguette).)
1 cda de aceite de oliva  (extra virgen.)
1 tomato with fine cuts (optional to add freshness).)
Fresh basil sheets (optional for an aromatic twist).)
Fresh cheeses and cheeses (optional to enrich the recipe).)

instructions: Cortar las marraquetas a la mitad y, si se desea, tostarlas ligeramente para intensificar el contraste de texturas.
Pelar las paltas, retirar el carozo y aplastar la pulpa con un tenedor en un bowl.
Add lemon juice, olive oil, salt and pepper and mix up with a rustic and homogenous cream.
Untar la palta sobre las mitades de marraqueta.
Optional: decorate with cuts of tomato, fresh basil or cheese, depending on their taste.
Servir inmediatamente para conservar la frescura de la palta.

mashed-potatoes-with-ranch-dressing.name: Mashed Potatoes With Ranch Dressing
instructions: Whisk all ingredients in small bowl to blend. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Place potatoes in large ovenproof pot. Pour enough cold water over to cover and add 1 tablespoon coarse salt. Bring to boil over high heat. Reduce heat to medium-high and cook until potatoes are tender when pierced with knife, about 20 minutes. Drain potatoes; reserve pot. Let potatoes stand in strainer until lukewarm, about 20 minutes. Working in batches, press potatoes through potato ricer back into same pot (do not stir; potatoes should be fluffy). DO AHEAD Potatoes can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Combine cream, milk, and butter in small saucepan; bring to simmer. Gently fold half of cream mixture into potatoes; repeat with remaining cream mixture. Fold 3/4 cup ranch dressing into potatoes; reserve remaining dressing for serving. Season potatoes to taste with more coarse salt and freshly ground black pepper.

Transfer pot with mashed potatoes to oven and rewarm uncovered until potatoes are heated through, about 10 minutes for freshly made potatoes or 30 minutes if potatoes are made ahead. Transfer mashed potatoes to large serving bowl. Drizzle with remaining dressing and serve.

meat-pies-teleculinaria.name: Meat Pies
instructions: Lay some olive oil on a pot, add the onion and chopped garlic and let it cook. Add the meat, season with salt, spices and minced chilli and cook until the meat is loose.
Adicione o tomate, mexa, junte o milho escorrido, tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva.
Extend the leafy dough on a floured surface and cut it in circles. Fill them with meat and lock them in half a moon. Press the union with a fork to close tight.
Have the sticks on a tray sprinkled with flour and brush them with a beaten egg. Take it in the oven, preheated at 200°C, for about 20 minutes or until golden.

meatballs-with-potatoes-and-tomato-sauce.name: Meatballs With Potatoes And Tomato Sauce
instructions: 1. Peel and repel the shell of onion to prepare meatballs.
2. Tighten the water of the onion you repel.
3. Wet and squeeze with water for bread.
4. In the grass, boiled bread, onion, parsley, salt and spices to a bowl.
5. Wash and round the large pieces without jealousy and fry in the angry oil.
6. Mix tomato juice in a bowl of 2 tablespoons of olive oil and crushed yellowms.
7. Roast potatoes in shell.
8. Cut down the shells and cut them into two.
9. For a spoon with the help of a spoon.
10. Index to oven tray.
11. 11. Place the meatballs on potatoes.
12. Going on the tomato sauce and sprinkled the grated cheese.
12. August Serve a few minutes in the hot oven.
14.  Afiyet olsun.
15. If you wish, check out the recipe of Cyprus meatballs.

meatballs-with-shallots-lezzet.name: Meatballs With Shallots
instructions: 1. Take Restrictions and reindeed onion into the kneading container.
2. After kneading well, the muket size mole prepare and cook in the pan.
3. roasted onions and yellowish olive oil until pink.
4. Add Salary
5. 1-2 minutes add more roasting water and leave boiling.
6. After boiling water, cook for 20 minutes by adding meatballs, salt and pepper.
7. Serve hot.

mediterranean-spaghetti-with-cherry-toma.name: Mediterranean Spaghetti With Cherry Tomatoes, Olives And Cucumber
mediterranean-spaghetti-with-cherry-toma.original_name: Espaguetis mediterráneos con tomates cherry, aceitunas y pepino

ingredients.item: 150 g de tomates cherry (cortados a la mitad)
50 g de aceitunas negras en rodajas
3  cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Opcional: queso feta desmenuzado para decorar

instructions: Put a big pot with water and a generous pint of salt to boil. Cooking the spaghetti following the package's instructions till they are at dente. Drain the dough and save some of the cooking water if you need it later.
While the pasta's cooking, cut the cherry tomatoes in half, olives into slices, cucumber and onion into small pieces. Put everything in a big bowl.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt and pepper. That will be the dressing that will give your plate life.
Once the spaghetti are ready, put them into the bowl with the vegetables. Fold the dressing above and mix well so that all ingredients are impregnated with flavors.
Test and adjust the date if necessary. If you feel a little dry, add one or two tablespoons of the dough's cooking water to give an extra touch of juicy.
Serves hot, warm or even cold, depending on your choice. For a final touch, add some padded Feta cheese if you wish.

megans-granola.name: Megan's Granola
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Line two large baking sheets with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
Combine oats, wheat germ, oat bran, sunflower seeds, almonds, pecans, and walnuts in a large bowl.

Stir oil, honey, brown sugar, maple syrup, cinnamon, vanilla, and salt together in a saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a boil, then pour over dry ingredients and stir to coat. Transfer to the prepared baking sheets and spread out evenly.
Bake in the preheated oven until crispy and toasted, about 20 minutes, stirring once halfway through. Let cool for 15 to 20 minutes, then stir in raisins.

mexican-coffee.name: Mexican Coffee
instructions: Pour sugar and hot water into a coffee mug. Stir in the coffee and liqueur, and then spoon whipped cream gently on top of the coffee.

mexican-eggs-recipe-comedera.name: Mexican Eggs Recipe
mexican-eggs-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de huevos a la mexicana
instructions: Retira de la cebolla y el tomate las partes que no vas a usar.
Corta ambas verduras en cuadritos o cubos.
Warm up a seatplate with some oil and spray the onion till clear a little.
Incorporates the shredded chili, mixes and jumps for another two minutes.
Agrega el tomate picadito y cocina por un minuto.
En un bol, vierte los dos huevos y sazona con sal y pimienta.
Bate muy bien hasta que queden espumosos.
Incorporates broken eggs into frying pan and cooks for two minutes.
After that time, it scrambles till everything's well mixed and ends up cooking for 3 more minutes or till they get curved.
Once ready, serve with refries and corn tortillas.
Enjoy!

microwave-lemon-curd.name: Microwave Lemon Curd
instructions: Whisk sugar and eggs together in a microwave-safe bowl until smooth. Stir in lemon juice, melted butter, and lemon zest.
Microwave on high in 1-minute intervals, stirring after each interval, until thick enough to coat the back of a metal spoon.
Pour into small sterile jars.

midnight-nutella-dip.name: Midnight Nutella Dip
instructions: Combine chocolate-hazelnut spread, milk, honey, and vanilla extract in a small microwave-safe container.
Heat in microwave oven for 1 minute.
Stir the dip with a toothpick until somewhat smooth; let cool for 2 minutes before eating.

milk-pie-with-kadaifi-argiro.name: Milk Pie With Kadaifi

ingredients.item: 50 grissimigdali thick (or 150 g in total that of both you want)
250 gruel of sheep and goats, melted or pure butter
50 grissimigdali thick (or 150 g in total that of both you want)
250 gruel of sheep and goats, melted or pure butter

instructions: Keep 1 cup of the cold milk and add the rest with half the sugar and lemon peel in a pot.
Allow on medium heat to warm and perfume.
In bowls, add the rest of the sugar, eggs, semolina, vanillas and salt and with a strong wire or hand mixer, beat them together well and break the eggs, homogenizing the mixture.
Add the 1 cup of cold milk we kept and mix.
We take 1 cup of hot milk from the pot and always by whisking, pour it into the egg mixture to dilute and heat lightly.
Add another cup of hot milk and dilute the mixture.
Add it to the hot milk and mix for a few minutes until it binds slightly.
Boil for 1.5 to 2 minutes after boiling.
After binding, remove the peel and add the 100 g butter. Gently mix to melt into the cream.
Bake in a well preheated evening at 170 to 180°C on the resistors, on the bottom grill for about 55 minutes until it turns red and removes all the sweet from the baking pan.
Remove from oven, set it aside for 2 to 3 minutes and simmer slowly with lukewarm syrup.
After we drop half we wait a few minutes and then gradually add the rest.
Allow it to cool completely and absorb moisture and then cut into pieces.
If you cut it warm, then the syrup will gather at the bottom of the baking pan and the bottom leaves will soak.

minced-meat-roll-with-eggs-and-honeyed-p.name: Minced Meat Roll With Eggs And Honeyed Potatoes
minced-meat-roll-with-eggs-and-honeyed-p.original_name: Ρολό κιμά με αυγά και μελωμένες πατάτες

ingredients.item: 2 kg minced, mixed, pork and veal
8-10 potatoes cut into slices or quinces
1/2 ltzom of meat and liquids of the baking pan
2 kg minced, mixed, pork and veal
8-10 potatoes cut into slices or quinces
1/2 ltzom of meat and liquids of the baking pan

instructions: We start by placing all the ingredients for the roll in a large bowl.
We knead them very well, for a long time, until the mixture is well fluffy.
Allow it to stand covered in the refrigerator, to combine the flavors for about 30 minutes.
Place the mixture of minced meat on a large sheet of parchment paper.
Spread the minced meat all over the paper surface.
Add the filling materials, eggs, cheese or whatever you like.
With the help of the parchment paper wrap the stuffed meat roll.

minho-style-spare-rib-rice-teleculinaria.name: Minho-style Spare Rib Rice
minho-style-spare-rib-rice-teleculinaria.original_name: Arroz de entrecosto à moda do Minho
instructions: Cut the ribs and bacon into small pieces and put them in a container. Add the chopped onion, the crushed garlic, the laurel leaf, parsley, red wine, vinegar, colorau, salt, pepper and cumin to taste. Shake very well and let marinate overnight.

The next day, it drains the meat and reserves the marinade, separating the liquid from the solids. Light a pot with the oil and butter and let it warm. Add the ribs and bacon, as well as the onions, garlic and blonde marinade. Let it brown, stirring so it doesn't burn. Then add the marinade liquid, cover the pot immediately and let cook for about 2 minutes.
Add the water and whole sausage, season with salt and let it cook, in moderate heat, until the sausage is cooked. If necessary, add some more water. Remove the meats and sausage and reserve.

Measure the previous broth to obtain twice the volume of the rice (if not enough, add water). Keep it in the pot, take it to the fire and let it boil. Add the rice and let cook for about 18 minutes in medium/low heat.

Then transfer to an oven tray (if possible, clay). Cut the sausage into slices and dispose on the rice surface as well as the other meats. Take it to the oven, preheated in the grill function, until the meats toast. Serve immediately.

mini-chocolate-cupcakes.name: Mini Chocolate Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 16 mini muffin cups with paper liners.
Mix flour, brown sugar, white sugar, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl. Break up clumps lightly with a whisk.

Mix milk, egg, oil, and vanilla extract together in a separate bowl until well incorporated. Whisk into the flour mixture until well incorporated and there are no clumps. Do not overmix the batter. Fold in pudding with a spatula while scraping the bottom of the bowl. Stir in chocolate chips; batter will be runny and not very thick.
Pour batter into the prepared cupcake cups with a Wilton® cookie scoop or measuring cup with a spout, filling each 2/3 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of a cupcake comes out clean, about 10 minutes.

miso-salmon-with-sake-butter.name: Miso Salmon With Sake Butter
instructions: Bring water and rice to a boil in a saucepan. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until most of the water has been absorbed, about 20 minutes.
While rice cooks, place snow peas on top of rice and steam, covered, until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Transfer snow peas to a bowl to stop cooking; set aside.
Preheat the oven broiler. Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source. Line a baking dish with aluminum foil and coat with cooking spray.
Arrange salmon fillets on the prepared baking dish. Whisk together brown sugar, soy sauce, hot water, and miso in a small bowl until combined; spoon over salmon.
Broil in the preheated oven, basting frequently with soy sauce mixture, until golden brown and fish flakes easily with a fork, 10 to 15 minutes.

While salmon cooks, make sauce: Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Add ginger and shallots; cook and stir until shallots are translucent, 2 to 3 minutes. Add 1/2 cup sake; bring to a boil and cook until reduced by 2/3, about 3 minutes. Add heavy cream; bring to a boil and cook until sauce is reduced by half, about 2 minutes.
Whisk in butter, one cube at a time, until incorporated and sauce is thick and creamy. Remove from heat. Whisk in remaining 1 tablespoon sake and lime juice. Season with salt.
Spoon some sake sauce onto 4 serving plates. Place rice in the middle of each and top with a salmon fillet. Arrange snow peas around each plate. Garnish with chives.

miso-rubbed-turkey-with-turkey-gravy.name: Miso-rubbed Turkey With Turkey Gravy

ingredients.prep: softened, plus additional melted butter (from 1/2 stick) if turkey drippings yield less than 1/2 cup fat
any feathers and quills removed with tweezers or needlenose pliers, and neck and giblets reserved for another use if desired

ingredients.item: Metal picks or skewers; kitchen string; a 19- by 13-inch flameproof roasting pan with a rack; an instant-read thermometer

instructions: Peel and chop 1 onion quarter, then pulse in a food processor until finely chopped. Add miso and purée until smooth. Add 1/2 stick softened butter and 1/2 teaspoon pepper and purée until combined (mixture will appear curdled).
Put oven rack in lowest position and preheat oven to 177°C.

Rinse turkey inside and out, then pat dry. Working from large cavity end, gently run your fingers between skin and meat of breast to loosen skin, being careful not to tear skin. Push miso butter under skin, including thighs and drumsticks, and massage skin from outside to spread miso evenly. Sprinkle large cavity with salt and remaining 1/2 teaspoon pepper. Fold neck skin under body and secure with metal picks or skewers, then stuff large cavity with remaining 3 onion quarters. Tie drumsticks together with string and tuck wings under body.
Put turkey on rack in roasting pan and roast 30 minutes.

Melt remaining 1/2 stick softened butter and brush over turkey, then add water (1 cup) to roasting pan. Tent turkey with foil and roast, basting every 30 minutes and adding more water to pan if necessary, until thermometer inserted into fleshy part of a thigh (do not touch bone) registers 77°C, 2 to 2 1/2 hours more (total roasting time: 2 1/2 to 3 hours). Remove foil for last 30 minutes of roasting if turkey is pale. Transfer turkey to a platter (reserve roasting pan) and let stand, loosely covered, 25 minutes (temperature will rise to 82°C while turkey stands). Remove picks from turkey.

Pour pan juices through a fine-mesh sieve into a 2-quart glass measure, then skim off and reserve fat. (If there is less than 1/2 cup fat, add enough melted butter to total 1/2 cup.) Pour pan juices and 8 cups turkey stock into a 3-quart saucepan and bring to a simmer. Straddle roasting pan across 2 burners, then add remaining cup turkey stock and deglaze roasting pan by boiling over moderately high heat, stirring and scraping up brown bits, 1 minute. Pour through sieve into remaining stock and bring to a simmer.

Cook flour and 1/2 cup reserved fat in a 4-quart heavy pot over moderately low heat, whisking, 5 minutes. Add hot stock mixture in a fast stream, whisking constantly to prevent lumps, then simmer, whisking occasionally, until gravy is thickened, about 10 minutes. Stir in any turkey juices accumulated on platter and season gravy with salt and pepper.

mixed-pickled-vegetables-argiro.name: Mixed Pickled Vegetables

ingredients.item: 2 large carrots cleaned and cut into thick slices
2 large carrots cleaned and cut into thick slices

instructions: Wash the various vegetables, cauliflower, carrots etc. first, and cut them into pieces.
Heat the mixed vegetables for 3 minutes in boiling water.
After boiling, we take them with a drilled spoon and put them in a large, sterile jar that seals well.
Add the salt and pepper for the pickle and pour them to cover with the boiling water.
Add the vinegar, let them cool.
Seal the vase. After 24 hours we can consume it.
After opening it, keep it in the refrigerator.

mixed-salad-with-prosciutto-and-apricots.name: Mixed Salad With Prosciutto And Apricots
mixed-salad-with-prosciutto-and-apricots.original_name: Ανάμεικτη σαλάτα με προσούτο και βερίκοκα
instructions: Cut the apricots in half first and remove the pits.
In an anti-stick pan or grill, add the apricots with the cut side upwards.
Sprinkle a little oil and balsamic vinegar and bake for about 5 minutes to soften slightly but not lose shape.
Let them cool.
Add all the salad leaves, rocket, stamnagathi and iceberg in a bowl.
Beat the vinegar with some salt and pour the salad.
We mix very well.
Add the salad to 4 dishes, add the mint and basil leaves.
Balance on the dishes and baked apricots, prosciutto and cream cheese.
Sprinkle with some balsamic cream.

modern-medicine.name: Modern Medicine
instructions: Combine the bourbon, Aperol, fresh lemon juice, demerara syrup, and bitters in a cocktail shaker and shake with ice until well chilled.
Strain into a rocks glass over ice.
Carefully float the scotch over the top of the cocktail by slowly pouring it over the back of a bar spoon.
Then, take a lemon twist and place it on the side of the rim of the glass.

molotof-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Molotof Recipe
instructions: Fill a form with butter and sprinkle it with sugar. Reserve. Start the oven at 180 degrees.
Hit the clears, gradually adding half the sugar. Pour in shape, smooth and bake for 12 minutes. After this time, turn off the oven and let it cool for 30 minutes to 1 hour. Then remove and deform.

Bring to the fire a pot with the remaining sugar, water and yolks, always stirring until it thickens. Remove from the flame, pass through a network pusher and let it cool. Lie on the molotof and serve fresh.

moms-cabbage-rolls-argiro.name: Mom's Cabbage Rolls
instructions: Remove the cabbage stem after cutting it with a knife.
Then immerse it with the hole downwards in a boiling pot.
Boil for 10-15 minutes to soften slightly.
Mix the filling materials well and ferment until the minced meat is white.
Take out a vegetable leaf and remove the thick nerves.
Add a spoonful of soup and wrap.
Lay on the base of a plate pot of vegetable leaves and onion slices.
Place the dolmades in order close to each other and cover with a plate so that they do not unfold.
Pour them with broth or water, just covering them, add 1/3 cup of tea olive oil.
Add salt and pepper.
If we have flower stems and parsley, tie them with string and add them to the pot to flavor the food.
Add the lid and simmer for 40-45 minutes.

moros-con-cristianos-congri.name: Moros Con Cristianos (congrí)
instructions: In a pressure cooker on medium heat, saute diced pork belly until pieces are crunchy and have released all the grease.
Increase heat to medium-high, add sausage and bacon, and cook thoroughly. Once cooked through, add the green pepper, fry, and add onions and stir until transparent.
Lower heat to Medium, add crushed garlic and rice, and mix thoroughly. To this add cumin, oregano, and any other desired spices.
Next, add the black beans (without draining), 2 cups of water, bay leaf, and vinegar and mix. Season with salt or seasoning as necessary.
Cover and cook on medium for 15-20 minutes, then let rest.
Serve warm.

mouthwatering-charred-beets-with-ricotta.name: Mouthwatering Charred Beets With Ricotta

ingredients.prep:
plus oil from jar for
serving

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Stir 1 garlic clove, finely grated, 2 Tbsp. low-sodium soy sauce, 2 Tbsp. unseasoned rice vinegar, 2 tsp. sugar, 2 tsp. chili crisp, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl until sugar and salt are dissolved. Set dressing aside.

Toss ½ bunch Tuscan kale, stems and ribs removed, 1 lb. prepared unseasoned cooked beets, drained, and ¼ cup vegetable oil in a large bowl with your hands until well coated. Grill kale and beets, turning occasionally, until kale is crisp and mostly charred and beets are well charred all over, about 5 minutes for kale, 12–15 minutes for beets. Transfer vegetables to a cutting board; let sit until cool enough to handle. Cut beets into quarters. Cut kale into large pieces. Add beets to reserved dressing; toss to coat. Let sit 20 minutes.
Just before serving, drizzle sliced sourdough bread or focaccia lightly with extra-virgin olive oil. Grill, turning often, until golden brown and toasted, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Spread 8 oz. fresh ricotta on a platter. Add kale to bowl with beets; toss to combine. Spoon mixture over ricotta and tuck 4 oz. fresh mozzarella, torn into bite-size pieces, around beets. Drizzle a spoonful of chili crisp oil over. Serve with grilled bread.

mozzarella-in-carrozza-italian-fried-moz.name: Mozzarella In Carrozza (italian Fried Mozzarella Sandwiches)

ingredients.item: Firm fresh mozzarella cheese or low-moisture mozzarella cut into 1/4-inch-thick slices or pre sliced thin
Diamond crystal kosher salt; if using table salt
Neutral oil such as vegetable or canola

instructions: If using fresh mozzarella, place slices in a single layer on a paper-towel lined plate and press dry with paper towels. If using, spread 1 teaspoon mayonnaise on one side of each slice of bread. Divide cheese in an even layer among 2 bread slices (cheese should measure about 1/4-inch thick). Then, top with the remaining bread slices, mayonnaise side down.
Use a serrated knife to neatly cut off crusts of bread to form a uniform square.
In a shallow bowl, whisk eggs and Pecorino together to combine. In a second shallow bowl, combine bread crumbs, salt, and pepper.

Working with 1 sandwich at a time, dip each sandwich on all sides in the egg mixture, letting excess egg drip back into bowl, then coat in the bread crumb mixture, making sure the entire sandwich is evenly coated with bread crumbs. Transfer the sandwich to a plate and repeat the dredging process with the remaining sandwich. Refrigerate sandwiches while oil is heating, about 20 minutes.

Line a large plate with paper towels; set aside. In a 10-inch cast iron skillet or Dutch oven, add oil until it measures 1 inch deep and heat over medium-high heat to 325ºF (160ºC). Using a spatula or spider skimmer, carefully transfer both sandwiches to the hot oil and fry until deep golden brown on the bottom, adjusting heat as needed to maintain oil temperature between 300 to 325ºF, about 2 minutes. Use 2 spatulas or tongs to flip sandwiches and continue to fry until deep golden brown on the second side, about 2 minutes longer.

Transfer sandwiches to the prepared paper towel-lined plate and let sit for 90 seconds. Transfer to a cutting board and use a serrated knife to cut halfway through the bread, stopping right before you hit the cheese. Flip the sandwich over and again cut through bread, stopping before slicing through the cheese. Slowly pull sandwich halves apart for an impressive cheese pull.

mulligatawny-soup.name: Mulligatawny Soup

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breast half - cut into cubes

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a large soup pot over medium heat. Add onions, celery, and carrot and sauté until soft, 5 to 7 minutes. Add flour and curry, and cook 5 more minutes, stirring frequently.
Add chicken broth, mix well, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for about 30 minutes. Add apple, rice, chicken, thyme, salt, and pepper. Simmer until rice is tender, 15 to 20 minutes.
Just before serving, stir in hot cream.
Serve and enjoy!

mussels-in-lime-coconut-broth.name: Mussels In Lime-coconut Broth
instructions: Heat butter in a sauce pan over medium heat. Add shallots and cook until soft, 5 to 7 minutes. Add garam masala, turmeric, bay leaves, and chile pepper and cook until fragrant, about 3 minutes more.

Add ginger and tomato paste to the saucepan and cook until browned, about 2 minutes. Pour in coconut milk and lime juice. Mix in sugar and black pepper; stir well. Bring to a simmer, about 5 minutes. Taste and adjust salt.
Add mussels to the saucepan and simmer until all shells open, about 5 minutes. Discard any shells that do not open. Place in a bowl and sprinkle with cilantro.
